name: jq1
drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p : T0(f0 > 0)
    ?Q0($x;)
then
    insertLogical(new T2($x));
end
rule "R1"
salience -5
when
    T0(f0 > 5)
    $p : T0(f0 > 0, f0 < 3)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "R2"
salience -10
when
    $t : T2($v : f0)
then
end
query Q0(long $q0)
    T1(f0 == $q0, f0 > 1)
end
engine_fenced: insertLogical from ?query rules (D-076/D-312 wall; oracle RUNS it — liftable in a future revalidation round; D-361 records)
